description: Create a GitLab CI pipeline that uses the docker:latest Docker image with a docker:dind service, defines a CONTAINER_IMAGE variable as $DOCKER_HUB_USERNAME/$CI_PROJECT_NAME, and includes a single build stage. Add a global before_script that logs into Docker Hub with echo "$DOCKER_HUB_PASSWORD" | docker login -u "$DOCKER_HUB_USERNAME" --password-stdin. In the build job (named build, stage build) execute the commands: docker build --pull -t $CONTAINER_IMAGE:$CI_JOB_ID -t $CONTAINER_IMAGE:latest . and docker push $CONTAINER_IMAGE. No caches, artifacts, or special rules are required.
